trials.supervisor_analysis: Trial 1 failed due to an LLM provider API error (VertexGenAI returned BadRequest about tool types). The agent never actually started working on the task. Retrying.

Trial 2 failed due to the same LLM provider API error (VertexGenAI BadRequest about tool types). The agent never started working on the task. This is an infrastructure issue, not a task logic failure. Retrying with very explicit step-by-step instructions so the agent can complete quickly once the API works.

All 3 trials failed due to LLM provider API errors (VertexGenAI BadRequest about tool types). The agent never started working on the task. Retrying with extremely detailed step-by-step instructions so the agent can complete quickly if the API stabilizes.
